earnings.assumptions: Estimate is based on global evergreen streaming, sync friendliness, family-playlist demand, and songwriter participation.

ownership.master_owner: Label-distributed master with strong artist-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears valuable because of writer-led participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range, not a public settlement of master and publishing receipts.
